name: magnetar-eidolon-workspace
description: Root workspace scripts for running the MagnetarEidolon UI and CLI from the repository root.

scripts.setup: npm --prefix packages/magnetar-sdk install && npm --prefix apps/magnetar-api install && npm --prefix apps/magnetar-ui install
scripts.dev:open: bash -lc 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; npm --prefix apps/magnetar-api run start:dev & npm --prefix apps/magnetar-ui run web:open -- --host 0.0.0.0'
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/magnetar-api run build && npm --prefix apps/magnetar-ui run build
scripts.validate: npm run validate:required-docs && npm run test:required-docs && npm run validate:project-schema && npm run test:project-schema
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/magnetar-api run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/magnetar-ui run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run validate && npm --prefix apps/magnetar-api run test && npm --prefix apps/magnetar-ui run test:ci
